basic_details.job_title: CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Glass & Ceramic Research Institute (CSIR CGCRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Glass & Ceramic Research Institute (CSIR CGCRI) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate - I Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 06-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years (Relaxable for SC/ST/PH/Female and OBCs)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/Physically Handicapped and Female: 5 years OBCs (Non-Creamy layer candidates): 3 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry / Materials Science / Physics OR B.E. / B.Tech in Material Science / Metallurgical & Materials Engineering / Ceramic Engineering / Chemical Engineering.
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Chemistry / Materials Science / Physics from a recognized university or equivalent. B.E. / B.Tech in Material Science / Metallurgical & Materials Engineering / Ceramic Engineering / Chemical Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA as admissible p.m. to the candidate who are selected through a process of (a) National Eligibility Tests - CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) or GATE or (b) A selection process through National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their agencies and Institutions. Rs. 25,000/- + HRA as admissible p.m to the candidates who do not fall under the above category.

selection_process: Walk-in-Interview (hybrid mode: offline as well as online)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR CGCRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR CGCRI Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR CGCRI?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application via email for the Project Associate - I position at CSIR CGCRI is 06-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate - I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Sc. in Chemistry, Materials Science, or Physics, OR a B.E./B.Tech in Material Science, Metallurgical & Materials Engineering, Ceramic Engineering, or Chemical Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Associate - I recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/PH/Female candidates (5 years) and OBCs (3 years).

faq.question: Q4. How will the candidates be selected for the Project Associate - I role?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on a Walk-in-Interview, which will be conducted in a hybrid mode, allowing for both offline and online participation.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 31,000/- + HRA or Rs. 25,000/- + HRA, depending on the selection process through national eligibility tests or other selection procedures.

faq.question: Q6. How should I apply for the Project Associate - I position?
faq.answer: You need to send a soft copy of the duly filled application form along with self-attested copies of supporting documents to the provided email ID: [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 05/2627/SGD/FTT/SM.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR CGCRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CGCRI is located in Kolkata, with the pincode 700032.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from across India apply for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, the job is advertised as being available across India, indicating that candidates from all over the country are eligible to apply.
